first_draft.name: First Draft
first_draft.description: Publish your very first book. A monumental first step on a long journey.
first_draft.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a single fountain pen nib with a drop of ink falling from it, centered inside a plain circle. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, soft palette of warm grey and gold, gentle flat shading, no realism. The circle background is pastel cream, and the overall image background is pastel peach.

prolific.name: Prolific
prolific.description: Publish 10 books. The words are flowing and your library is growing.
prolific.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a tall, leaning stack of colorful simplified books, centered inside a plain circle. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, warm palette of muted primary colors, gentle flat shading, no realism. The circle background is pastel yellow, and the overall image background is pastel butter yellow.

Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, muted palette of warm ochre and soft brown, gentle flat shading, no realism. The circle background is pastel beige, and the overall image background is pastel tan.
